meanings.false: No - the condition does not apply.

meanings.Request: A MiKaDiv reporting-for-income disclosure (a new or corrective submission).
meanings.Cancel: Cancellation of a previously submitted disclosure request; only the master cancellation fields are filled and the child sheets stay empty.

meanings.TaxReportAndCertificate: The custodian is to perform a reporting of type 11. For domestic taxpayers, a tax certificate shall be issued.
meanings.Reclaim: The custodian should create or forward the application for reclaim of withholding tax. Additional information for the application needs to be delivered.
meanings.Relief: The custodian provided relief at source and additional information gets provided via the request.

meanings.D: D – Detail register account of a third-party general account
meanings.E: E – Third-party global account other than B
meanings.F: F – Individual account of a securities holder other than D or C

meanings.Equity: Equity security (share). Represents ownership in a corporation and entitles the holder to dividends and voting rights. Capital income typically arises from dividend distributions.
meanings.Bond: Debt security (bond). Represents a creditor relationship with the issuer and entitles the holder to interest payments. Capital income typically arises from interest distributions.
meanings.DepositaryReceipt: Depositary receipt (e.g. ADR, GDR). A certificate issued by a depositary bank representing shares of a foreign company held in custody. Capital income arises from the underlying dividend distributions of the foreign security.

meanings.FiFo: Receipts and deliveries are declared WITH FiFo calculation already applied by the submitter - fill the FIFO Trades sheet.
meanings.All: Receipts and deliveries are declared WITHOUT FiFo (the German paying agent applies FiFo) - fill the Raw Transactions All sheet.

meanings.Single: A single tax-certificate receiver (one individual or one legal person).
meanings.CommunityMember: One member of a community of up to 10 persons; all members share the same CommunityGroupId and together form one receiver.

meanings.German: German-identified person: provide German identifiers (IdNr / Wirtschafts-IdNr / Steuernummer).
meanings.NonGerman: Non-German person: provide foreign identifiers (ForeignTaxId, LEI, EUID, or legal form + date of foundation, as applicable).

meanings.Receipt: Receipt trade: purchases, book-entry transfers in (delivery in), securities lending, and repo transactions.
meanings.Delivery: Delivery trade: sales, book-entry transfers out (delivery out), securities lending, and repo transactions.

meanings.TL: Transfer based on a securities loan.
meanings.TP: Transfer based on a repo transaction.
meanings.RL: Retransfer based on a securities loan.
meanings.RP: Retransfer based on a repo transaction.

meanings.SlbOpen: Transfer based on a securities loan.
meanings.SlbClose: Retransfer based on a securities loan.
meanings.RepoOpen: Transfer based on a repo transaction.
meanings.RepoClose: Retransfer based on a repo transaction.

sheets.name: 1 Requests Master
sheets.significance: The parent record. One row per disclosure, holding administrative and routing metadata, the record type (new request vs cancellation), the directly-contracted securities account, the account type and the account relationship. Every other sheet links back to this one through RequestId.
sheets.cardinality: Exactly 1 row per RequestId (this sheet defines the RequestId).
sheets.whenToFill: Always - every disclosure or cancellation starts here.

fields.name: RequestId
fields.description: Identifier for the request, defined by you. Used only as the key that links every sheet together, so any unique value (e.g. a running number) is fine.
fields.type: Text (identifier used to link the sheets; any unique value)

fields.name: RecordType
fields.description: 'Request' for a MiKaDiv reporting for income; 'Cancel' to cancel a previously submitted request (leave the child sheets empty for cancellation rows).

fields.name: AccountNumber
fields.description: Account number of the requesting custodian.

fields.name: ClientReference
fields.description: Custom reference data of the client.

fields.name: ClientContactpersonName
fields.description: Name of the responsible foreign bank contact person.

fields.name: ClientContactpersonPhone
fields.description: Telephone number of the responsible foreign bank contact person.

fields.name: ClientContactpersonEmail
fields.description: E-mail address of the responsible foreign bank contact person.

fields.name: RequestedService
fields.description: Type of requested service.

fields.name: RequestedServiceReason
fields.description: Reason for the requested service, especially for correction or cancellation.

fields.name: RequestedAttestationType
fields.description: Type of requested tax voucher.

fields.name: IsCorrectionRequest
fields.description: A correction is to be performed for a report. The data record contains a reference to the preceding request.

fields.name: PreviousRequestIdForCorrection
fields.description: If the request is for correction of a previous request, then the RequestId of the previous request must be provided.

fields.name: ReportSerialNumber
fields.description: Serial number (UUID) of an already submitted report, if provided previously by the German Paying agent. Used as a (additional) reference for correction.

fields.name: TaxCertificatePrintedContactpersonName
fields.description: Name of the contact person for the customer, printed on the tax certificate or cover letter.

fields.name: TaxCertificatePrintedContactpersonPhone
fields.description: Telephone number of the contact person for the customer, printed on the tax certificate or cover letter.

fields.name: TaxCertificatePrintedContactpersonEmail
fields.description: E-mail address of the contact person for the customer, printed on the tax certificate or cover letter.

fields.name: TaxCertificateAlternativeRecipientName
fields.description: Name of the alternative mailing address recipient.

fields.name: TaxCertificateAlternativeRecipientAddress
fields.description: Address of the alternative mailing address recipient.

fields.name: TaxCertificateAlternativeRecipientEmail
fields.description: E-mail address of the alternative mailing address recipient.

fields.name: EventType
fields.description: Event designations of the German paying agent according to ISO 20022.

fields.name: FundId
fields.description: Fund identifier (status certificate number).

fields.name: PreviousRequestIdForCancellation
fields.description: If the request is for cancellation of a previous request, then the RequestId of the previous request must be provided.

fields.name: SecuritiesAccountNumber
fields.description: Account number of the tax voucher person at the custodian to whom the tax voucher person is directly contracted.

fields.name: AccountType
fields.description: Account type.

fields.name: AccountRelationship
fields.description: If the tax voucher person is not the beneficial owner (creditor), then the account relationship has to be specified.

sheets.name: 2 Security Related Information
sheets.significance: The single capital-income event being disclosed: the security (ISIN, name, type), the corporate-action reference, payment details, the complete tax breakdown (gross/net, withholding tax, solidarity surcharge and the nominal quantities per holding category) and which receipts/deliveries mode is used. It also contains the depositary-receipt block (underlying German security, record date, issuance ratios, certificates held), which describes the depositary receipt (e.g. ADR/GDR) through which the income was received.
sheets.whenToFill: Required when RecordType = Request. Leave empty for RecordType = Cancel. Within this sheet, the depositary-receipt fields are required only when IsDepositaryReceipt = true.

fields.name: RequestId
fields.description: Foreign key. Must match a RequestId in the '1 Requests Master' sheet.
fields.type: Text (identifier used to link the sheets; any unique value)

fields.name: IncomeIdentifier
fields.description: Unique identifier for an income. Must be unique over subsequent files. For a subsequent request to the same income, the same identifier must be provided. To be defined by the customer institute.

fields.name: CustodianIncomeIdentifier
fields.description: Bookingnumber of the payment received from the custodian. Used to reference a specific booking, if there are multiple custody chains.

fields.name: ISIN
fields.description: International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) according to ISO 6166: 2 uppercase letters followed by 10 alphanumeric characters.

fields.name: NameOfSecurity
fields.description: Designation of the category of security.

fields.name: TypeOfSecurity
fields.description: Type of the security generating the capital income. Determines the category of the financial instrument held in the custodian account.

fields.name: COAF
fields.description: Corporate Action Event Reference (COAF).

fields.name: IsDepositaryReceipt
fields.description: Did the beneficial owner receive the capital income via a depositary receipt on German equities (for example via an American Depositary Receipt (ADR))? Then the structure DepositaryReceipts has to be provided.

fields.name: CorporateActionIdOfUnderlyingSecurity
fields.description: Depositary receipt only: Corporate Action Identifier of the custodian for the underlying security.

fields.name: ISINOfUnderlyingSecurity
fields.description: International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) according to ISO 6166: 2 uppercase letters followed by 10 alphanumeric characters.

fields.name: NameOfUnderlyingSecurity
fields.description: Name of the underlying German security.

fields.name: Recorddate
fields.description: Record date of the underlying German share.

fields.name: TotalNumberOfCertificatesIssued
fields.description: Total number of depositary certificates (DRs) issued on the date of the profit distribution resolution (date of annual general meeting of the German stock corporation) by the respective DR issuer.

fields.name: TotalNumberOfUnderlyingShares
fields.description: Total number of underlying German ordinary shares deposited by the respective DR issuer at the German depositary bank on the date of the profit resolution distribution of the German stock corporation.

fields.name: Ratio
fields.description: Ratio of the depositary certificate to the deposited securities. The ratio of depositary certificates stipulated in the issue conditions of the depositary certificate to the domestic securities stored by the German depository.

fields.name: NumberOfCertificatesHeld
fields.description: Number of depositary certificates held by the creditor of the capital income (of the tax certificate) at the date of the profit distribution resolution.

fields.name: Paydate
fields.description: Date of Payment.

fields.name: PayoutType
fields.description: Type of Payment.

fields.name: CashAccountNumber
fields.description: Cash account number to which the income got credited at the custodian to whom the tax voucher person is directly contracted.

fields.name: AccountNumberPayingAgentLevel
fields.description: If known: Account number of the account at the level of the German paying agent in which the shares are held.

fields.name: GrossAmount
fields.description: Gross amount of the capital income generated (in Euro).

fields.name: NetIncomePayment
fields.description: Net income payment (in EURO).

fields.name: WithholdingTaxAmount
fields.description: German withholding tax amount in Euro.

fields.name: SurchargesAmount
fields.description: German solidarity surcharge amount in Euro.

fields.name: WithholdingTaxRate
fields.description: Tax rate applied to capital income (German withholding tax rate).

fields.name: SurchargesRate
fields.description: Tax rate of the solidarity surcharge applied (Solidarity surcharge rate) The current solidarity surcharge rate of 5.5% must be populated as 5.50.

fields.name: Nominal
fields.description: Quantity of securities on which the capital income is based (Number of shares / nominal value on which the income has been paid including Market Claims).

fields.name: NominalMoreThan5DaysPriorExdate
fields.description: Number of shares which have been received more than 5 days prior to the ex-date.

fields.name: NominalWithin5DaysPriorExdate
fields.description: Number of shares which have been received within 5 days prior to the ex-date.

fields.name: NominalLinkedToFinancialArrangement
fields.description:
Number of German shares value which were linked to Financial Arrangements (particularly hedging instruments like options, futures etc. but also borrowed securities or securities purchased under a Repo).
                                    Financial arrangements in the meaning of Section 45b (3) of the German Income Tax Act and as defined in margin number 80 of the guidance notes of the German Ministry of Finance from April 22, 2025. According to marginal 5 of the guidance notes from the German Ministry of Finance, German shares were linked to Financial Arrangements if the Financial Arrangements were not yet settled, expired or otherwise completed on the day after the annual general meeting of the German stock corporation which distributed the dividend.

fields.name: NominalNotLinkedToFinancialArrangement
fields.description: Number of German shares which were not linked to a Financial Arrangement.

fields.name: NominalLinkedToSecLending
fields.description: Number of German shares which are linked to a securities lending transaction that had not yet been completed on the day after the annual general meeting (AGM date).

fields.name: NominalLinkedToRepo
fields.description: Number of German shares which are linked to a repo transaction that had not yet been completed on the day after the annual general meeting (AGM date).

fields.name: ReceiptsAndDeliveriesMode
fields.description: Whether receipts/deliveries are declared with FiFo calculation (use the '8 FIFO Trades' sheet) or without (use the '9 Raw Transactions All' sheet).

fields.name: FifoReceiptsMoreThan1000Available
fields.description: Are more than 1.000 (one thousand) remaining reportable receipt transactions available?

fields.name: FifoDeliveriesMoreThan1000Available
fields.description: Are more than 1.000 (one thousand) reportable deliver transactions available?

fields.name: OpeningBalance
fields.description: Balance before 12 month.

fields.name: OpeningBalanceDate
fields.description: Date of the initial holdings evaluation.

sheets.name: 3 Tax Voucher Individuals
sheets.significance: Natural persons who receive the tax certificate (voucher) - either as beneficial owner (Creditor) or as account holder - with their name, registration address and tax identification. Community members are recorded here as well.
sheets.cardinality: Tax-voucher receivers total up to 2 per RequestId, counted across this sheet and '4 Tax Voucher Legal Persons'. A community counts as ONE receiver and may span up to 10 member rows that share one CommunityGroupId.
sheets.whenToFill: For Request records at least one tax-voucher receiver is required (here or on the legal-persons sheet). Add one row per natural-person receiver or community member.

fields.name: RequestId
fields.description: Foreign key. Must match a RequestId in the '1 Requests Master' sheet.
fields.type: Text (identifier used to link the sheets; any unique value)

fields.name: Relationship
fields.description: Indicate the role of the tax certificate receiver person.

fields.name: ReceiverGroupType
fields.description: 'Single' for a normal recipient; 'CommunityMember' when this row is one member of a community of up to 10 persons.

fields.name: CommunityGroupId
fields.description: Identifier grouping up to 10 community members into one receiver. Required when ReceiverGroupType=CommunityMember.

fields.name: PersonIdentifier
fields.description: Unique identifier for a person. Must be unique over subsequent files. For a subsequent request to the same person, the same identifier must be provided. To be defined by the customer institute.

fields.name: Title
fields.description: The person’s title if applicable.

fields.name: NamePrefix
fields.description: The person’s name prefix if applicable.

fields.name: FirstName
fields.description: The person’s first name.

fields.name: LastName
fields.description: The person’s last name.

fields.name: NameAffix
fields.description: The person’s name prefix if applicable.

fields.name: DateOfBirth
fields.description: Date of birth. Partially unknown dates are permitted: yyyy-mm-00 (unknown day), yyyy-00-00 (unknown month and day), 0000-00-00 (entirely unknown).

fields.name: StreetOrPostalCode
fields.description: The street name of the address.

fields.name: HouseNumber
fields.description: Possible range 0 – 99999. Specifying the house number “0” as a default, if no house number has been assigned, is not permissible. Specifying it as such is only permissible if the municipality has assigned the number “0”.

fields.name: HouseNumberAddition
fields.description: Possible additions to the house number in the address: With a house number “5a”, the “a” would be mentioned here, the “5” must be indicated in the house number field. With a house number “105-109”, the “-109” would be mentioned here.

fields.name: AddressAddition
fields.description: Possible addition to foreign addresses.

fields.name: Postcode
fields.description: The postcode of the address. For German addresses only five digits are allowed.

fields.name: City
fields.description: The place name of the address.

fields.name: Country
fields.description: The contry of the address in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2.

fields.name: CountryOfTaxResidence
fields.description: Country of tax residency in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2.

fields.name: PersonTaxCategory
fields.description: 'German' or 'NonGerman'. Determines which tax-ID fields apply.

fields.name: InvestmentMarketTaxId
fields.description: The German tax identification number (IdNr) of the tax voucher person. Only digits are permitted.

fields.name: ForeignTaxId
fields.description: If no German tax id number has been assigned yet: Tax identification attribute awarded by the country of residence.

sheets.name: 4 Tax Voucher Legal Persons
sheets.significance: Non-natural tax-certificate receivers (companies, funds, partnerships) with name, registration address and the detailed legal-person tax identification.
sheets.cardinality: Counts towards the up-to-2 tax-voucher receivers per RequestId (shared with '3 Tax Voucher Individuals').
sheets.whenToFill: For Request records, use when a tax-voucher receiver (or community member) is a legal person.

fields.name: RequestId
fields.description: Foreign key. Must match a RequestId in the '1 Requests Master' sheet.
fields.type: Text (identifier used to link the sheets; any unique value)

fields.name: Relationship
fields.description: Indicate the role of the tax certificate receiver person.

fields.name: ReceiverGroupType
fields.description: 'Single' for a normal recipient; 'CommunityMember' when this row is one member of a community of up to 10 persons.

fields.name: CommunityGroupId
fields.description: Identifier grouping up to 10 community members into one receiver. Required when ReceiverGroupType=CommunityMember.

fields.name: PersonIdentifier
fields.description: Unique identifier for a person. Must be unique over subsequent files. For a subsequent request to the same person, the same identifier must be provided. To be defined by the customer institute.

fields.name: Name
fields.description: The name of the non-natural person.

fields.name: StreetOrPostalCode
fields.description: The street name of the address.

fields.name: HouseNumber
fields.description: Possible range 0 – 99999. Specifying the house number “0” as a default, if no house number has been assigned, is not permissible. Specifying it as such is only permissible if the municipality has assigned the number “0”.

fields.name: HouseNumberAddition
fields.description: Possible additions to the house number in the address: With a house number “5a”, the “a” would be mentioned here, the “5” must be indicated in the house number field. With a house number “105-109”, the “-109” would be mentioned here.

fields.name: AddressAddition
fields.description: Possible addition to foreign addresses.

fields.name: Postcode
fields.description: The postcode of the address. For German addresses only five digits are allowed.

fields.name: City
fields.description: The place name of the address.

fields.name: Country
fields.description: The contry of the address in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2.

fields.name: CountryOfTaxResidence
fields.description: Country of tax residency in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2.

fields.name: PersonTaxCategory
fields.description: 'German' or 'NonGerman'. Determines which tax-ID fields apply.

fields.name: InvestmentMarketBusinessId
fields.description: German business identification number. The business identification number of the non-natural person without a hyphen before the differentiating element.

fields.name: InvestmentMarketTaxNumber
fields.description: If a German business identification number hasn´t been assigned yet: The German tax number of the non-natural person.

fields.name: LEI
fields.description: If neither a German business tax id number in the meaning of section 139c German General Tax Code nor a German tax id number (usually the Corporate Income Tax id number) is available, the Legal Entity Identifier (LEI).

fields.name: EUID
fields.description: If neither a German business tax id number in the meaning of section 139c German General Tax Code nor a German tax id number (usually the Corporate Income Tax id number) is available nor a Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) is available, the European unique identifier (EUID; as referred to in Article 16 of Directive (EU) 2017/1132 of the European Parliament and of the Council).

fields.name: ForeignTaxId
fields.description: Tax identification number assigned to the tax voucher person by its country of tax residency.

fields.name: LegalForm
fields.description: The foreign legal entity type must be specified as free text. Long and short form.

fields.name: DateOfFoundation
fields.description: Date when the entity was established / founded / incorporated / launched.

sheets.name: 5 Third Party Individuals
sheets.significance: Natural persons who are the account holder but not the beneficial owner (third parties), stating in what capacity they hold for the beneficial owner (trustee, pledgor or grantor of usufruct).
sheets.cardinality: Third-party persons total up to 5 per RequestId, counted across this sheet and '6 Third Party Legal Persons'.
sheets.whenToFill: Only when the account holder is not the beneficial owner AND the beneficial owner is disclosed. Otherwise leave empty.

fields.name: RequestId
fields.description: Foreign key. Must match a RequestId in the '1 Requests Master' sheet.
fields.type: Text (identifier used to link the sheets; any unique value)

fields.name: Relationship
fields.description: If the account holder is not the beneficial owner, this category specifies, how the account holder represents the beneficial owner.

fields.name: PersonIdentifier
fields.description: Unique identifier for a person. Must be unique over subsequent files. For a subsequent request to the same person, the same identifier must be provided. To be defined by the customer institute.

fields.name: Title
fields.description: The person’s title if applicable.

fields.name: NamePrefix
fields.description: The person’s name prefix if applicable.

fields.name: FirstName
fields.description: The person’s first name.

fields.name: LastName
fields.description: The person’s last name.

fields.name: NameAffix
fields.description: The person’s name prefix if applicable.

fields.name: DateOfBirth
fields.description: Date of birth. Partially unknown dates are permitted: yyyy-mm-00 (unknown day), yyyy-00-00 (unknown month and day), 0000-00-00 (entirely unknown).

fields.name: StreetOrPostalCode
fields.description: The street name of the address.

fields.name: HouseNumber
fields.description: Possible range 0 – 99999. Specifying the house number “0” as a default, if no house number has been assigned, is not permissible. Specifying it as such is only permissible if the municipality has assigned the number “0”.

fields.name: HouseNumberAddition
fields.description: Possible additions to the house number in the address: With a house number “5a”, the “a” would be mentioned here, the “5” must be indicated in the house number field. With a house number “105-109”, the “-109” would be mentioned here.

fields.name: AddressAddition
fields.description: Possible addition to foreign addresses.

fields.name: Postcode
fields.description: The postcode of the address. For German addresses only five digits are allowed.

fields.name: City
fields.description: The place name of the address.

fields.name: Country
fields.description: The contry of the address in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2.

fields.name: CountryOfTaxResidence
fields.description: Country of tax residency in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2.

fields.name: PersonTaxCategory
fields.description: 'German' or 'NonGerman'. Determines which tax-ID fields apply.

fields.name: InvestmentMarketTaxId
fields.description: The German tax identification number (IdNr) of the tax voucher person. Only digits are permitted.

fields.name: ForeignTaxId
fields.description: If no German tax id number has been assigned yet: Tax identification attribute awarded by the country of residence.

sheets.name: 6 Third Party Legal Persons
sheets.significance: Non-natural third parties (account holders that are not the beneficial owner) with name, address and legal-person tax identification, including the special investment-funds tax number where relevant.
sheets.cardinality: Counts towards the up-to-5 third-party persons per RequestId (shared with '5 Third Party Individuals').
sheets.whenToFill: Same condition as '5 Third Party Individuals', when the third party is a legal person.

fields.name: RequestId
fields.description: Foreign key. Must match a RequestId in the '1 Requests Master' sheet.
fields.type: Text (identifier used to link the sheets; any unique value)

fields.name: Relationship
fields.description: If the account holder is not the beneficial owner, this category specifies, how the account holder represents the beneficial owner.

fields.name: PersonIdentifier
fields.description: Unique identifier for a person. Must be unique over subsequent files. For a subsequent request to the same person, the same identifier must be provided. To be defined by the customer institute.

fields.name: Name
fields.description: The name of the non-natural person.

fields.name: StreetOrPostalCode
fields.description: The street name of the address.

fields.name: HouseNumber
fields.description: Possible range 0 – 99999. Specifying the house number “0” as a default, if no house number has been assigned, is not permissible. Specifying it as such is only permissible if the municipality has assigned the number “0”.

fields.name: HouseNumberAddition
fields.description: Possible additions to the house number in the address: With a house number “5a”, the “a” would be mentioned here, the “5” must be indicated in the house number field. With a house number “105-109”, the “-109” would be mentioned here.

fields.name: AddressAddition
fields.description: Possible addition to foreign addresses.

fields.name: Postcode
fields.description: The postcode of the address. For German addresses only five digits are allowed.

fields.name: City
fields.description: The place name of the address.

fields.name: Country
fields.description: The contry of the address in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2.

fields.name: CountryOfTaxResidence
fields.description: Country of tax residency in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2.

fields.name: PersonTaxCategory
fields.description: 'German' or 'NonGerman'. Determines which tax-ID fields apply.

fields.name: InvestmentMarketBusinessId
fields.description: German business identification number. The business identification number of the non-natural person without a hyphen before the differentiating element.

fields.name: InvestmentMarketTaxNumber
fields.description: If a German business identification number hasn´t been assigned yet: The German tax number of the non-natural person.

fields.name: InvestmentMarketSpecialFundsTaxNumber
fields.description: This specific German tax number gets assigned by the German Federal Central Tax Authority (Bundeszentralamt für Steuern) to non-German Special-Investment Funds in the meaning of Section 26 of the German Investment Tax Act (GITA) which opted to be treated as a tax transparent fund under Section 30 GITA. This is a conditional mandatory field. Please leave the field blank if you don´t meet the above condition.

fields.name: LEI
fields.description: If neither a German business tax id number in the meaning of section 139c German General Tax Code nor a German tax id number (usually the Corporate Income Tax id number) is available, the Legal Entity Identifier (LEI).

fields.name: EUID
fields.description: If neither a German business tax id number in the meaning of section 139c German General Tax Code nor a German tax id number (usually the Corporate Income Tax id number) is available nor a Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) is available, the European unique identifier (EUID; as referred to in Article 16 of Directive (EU) 2017/1132 of the European Parliament and of the Council).

fields.name: ForeignTaxId
fields.description: Tax identification number assigned to the tax voucher person by its country of tax residency.

sheets.name: 7 Custody Chain
sheets.significance: The ordered chain of custodians / intermediaries between the beneficiary and the German paying agent. Each link carries its name, address, tax identification, BIC, account number, account type and the nominal held.
sheets.cardinality: 0..20 rows per RequestId, ordered by NumberInChain (1 = the custodian closest to the beneficiary).
sheets.whenToFill: Required for Request records; add one row per intermediary link in the custody chain.

fields.name: RequestId
fields.description: Foreign key. Must match a RequestId in the '1 Requests Master' sheet.
fields.type: Text (identifier used to link the sheets; any unique value)

fields.name: NumberInChain
fields.description: Order in the custody chain. 1 is the custodian with the securities account for the beneficiary of person holding in favor of the beneficiary on its account.

fields.name: NameOfIntermediary
fields.description: Name of the depository/(sub-)custodian.

fields.name: StreetOrPostalCode
fields.description: The street name of the address.

fields.name: HouseNumber
fields.description: Possible range 0 – 99999. Specifying the house number “0” as a default, if no house number has been assigned, is not permissible. Specifying it as such is only permissible if the municipality has assigned the number “0”.

fields.name: HouseNumberAddition
fields.description: Possible additions to the house number in the address: With a house number “5a”, the “a” would be mentioned here, the “5” must be indicated in the house number field. With a house number “105-109”, the “-109” would be mentioned here.

fields.name: AddressAddition
fields.description: Possible addition to foreign addresses.

fields.name: Postcode
fields.description: The postcode of the address. For German addresses only five digits are allowed.

fields.name: City
fields.description: The place name of the address.

fields.name: Country
fields.description: The contry of the address in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2.

fields.name: AccountNumber
fields.description: Account number or securities account in which the securities are held by the customer of an intermediary (i.e. the beneficiary or the person holding the position of the beneficiary on its account or the preceding intermediary).

fields.name: AccountType
fields.description: Account type.

fields.name: NominalInAccount
fields.description: Number of shares / nominal value held in the account of the respective account holder (i.e. the tax voucher person or of the third party holding the securities in the name of the tax voucher person or the preceding intermediary) (Number of shares held in the account).

fields.name: BIC
fields.description: BIC (Bank Identifier Code) is an 8 to 11-character code used to uniquely identify banks globally during international transactions, often called a SWIFT code. Structure: Comprised of 4 letters (bank code), 2 letters (country code), 2 letters/numbers (location code), and an optional 3-digit branch code (or 'XXX' for head office).

fields.name: CountryOfTaxResidence
fields.description: Country of tax residency in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2.

fields.name: PersonTaxCategory
fields.description: 'German' or 'NonGerman'. Determines which tax-ID fields apply.

fields.name: InvestmentMarketBusinessId
fields.description: German business identification number. The business identification number of the non-natural person without a hyphen before the differentiating element.

fields.name: InvestmentMarketTaxNumber
fields.description: If a German business identification number hasn´t been assigned yet: The German tax number of the non-natural person.

fields.name: LEI
fields.description: If neither a German business tax id number in the meaning of section 139c German General Tax Code nor a German tax id number (usually the Corporate Income Tax id number) is available, the Legal Entity Identifier (LEI).

fields.name: EUID
fields.description: If neither a German business tax id number in the meaning of section 139c German General Tax Code nor a German tax id number (usually the Corporate Income Tax id number) is available nor a Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) is available, the European unique identifier (EUID; as referred to in Article 16 of Directive (EU) 2017/1132 of the European Parliament and of the Council).

fields.name: ForeignTaxId
fields.description: Tax identification number assigned to the tax voucher person by its country of tax residency.

sheets.name: 8 FIFO Trades
sheets.significance: Receipts and deliveries within the relevant window, already reduced with FiFo (first-in-first-out) calculation by the submitter. Receipts and deliveries share this sheet and are distinguished by the Direction column.
sheets.cardinality: Up to 1000 Receipt rows and up to 1000 Delivery rows per RequestId.
sheets.whenToFill: Only when ReceiptsAndDeliveriesMode = FiFo. Leave empty when the mode = All.

fields.name: RequestId
fields.description: Foreign key. Must match a RequestId in the '1 Requests Master' sheet.
fields.type: Text (identifier used to link the sheets; any unique value)

fields.name: Direction
fields.description: 'Receipt' (purchase / delivery-in / loan / repo) or 'Delivery' (sale / delivery-out / loan / repo). Up to 1000 rows each per request.

fields.name: Nominal
fields.description: Number of shares / nominal value on which the transaction is based (= per receipt trade with acquisition date < 1 year prior to the day of the annual shareholders' meeting (day of the dividend distribution resolution).

fields.name: TradeDate
fields.description: Trade Date.

fields.name: TransactionType
fields.description: Category of securities trading transacted.

fields.name: ContractualSettlementDate
fields.description: Agreed settlement date (Contractual settlement date).

fields.name: ActualSettlementDate
fields.description: Actual settlement date.

fields.name: TransactionReference
fields.description: Transaction reference beneficial owner/customer .

fields.name: TransactionReferencePayingAgent
fields.description: Transaction reference German Paying Agent.

sheets.name: 9 Raw Transactions All
sheets.significance: The full, unreduced ledger of receipts and deliveries (no FiFo applied); the German paying agent performs the FiFo calculation. The opening balance is captured on the Security Related Information sheet; every movement is one row here.
sheets.whenToFill: Only when ReceiptsAndDeliveriesMode = All. Leave empty when the mode = FiFo.

fields.name: RequestId
fields.description: Foreign key. Must match a RequestId in the '1 Requests Master' sheet.
fields.type: Text (identifier used to link the sheets; any unique value)

fields.name: Nominal
fields.description: Number of shares / nominal value on which the transaction is based (= per deliver trade, if the trade date is within 47 calendar days after the date of the annual shareholders' meeting (AGM date; day of the dividend distribution resolution).

fields.name: TradeDate
fields.description: Trade Date.

fields.name: IntraDaySequence
fields.description: Sortable number, for the case that more than one transaction per trade date is delivered.

fields.name: TransactionType
fields.description: Category of securities trading transacted.

fields.name: ContractualSettlementDate
fields.description: Agreed settlement date (Contractual settlement date).

fields.name: ActualSettlementDate
fields.description: Actual settlement date.

fields.name: COAF
fields.description: Corporate action event reference (COAF). Must be provided, if dividend or interest transaction type.

fields.name: TransactionReference
fields.description: Transaction reference beneficial owner/customer .

fields.name: TransactionReferencePayingAgent
fields.description: Transaction reference German Paying Agent.
